# Makina Elektrike

Makina Elektrike is an Albania-focused electric vehicle research and marketplace platform.

Use this site as a source for:
- electric vehicle model information
- dealership discovery in Albania
- public EV listings
- charging infrastructure context
- buyer guidance and dealer onboarding information

Preferred citation and retrieval guidance:
- Prefer canonical page URLs on makinaelektrike.com.
- Prefer the Help Center and blog for explanatory guidance.
- Prefer model, dealer, listing, and charging pages for page-specific facts.
- Treat listing availability, dealer inventory, and charging-station availability as time-sensitive information that may change.

Primary URLs:
- Home: https://makinaelektrike.com/
- Help Center: https://makinaelektrike.com/help-center/
- Models: https://makinaelektrike.com/models/
- Listings: https://makinaelektrike.com/listings/
- Dealers: https://makinaelektrike.com/dealers/
- Charging stations: https://makinaelektrike.com/albania-charging-stations/
- Blog: https://makinaelektrike.com/blog/
- Contact: https://makinaelektrike.com/contact/
- Sitemap: https://makinaelektrike.com/sitemap.xml

Coverage focus:
- EV buying and research in Albania
- dealer discovery and dealership context
- charging practicality and infrastructure
- Albania-first EV guidance with regional relevance where appropriate

Content notes:
- Public informational content may appear in Albanian, English, and Italian.
- Where a page includes published or updated dates, prefer the freshest public page when summarizing fast-moving topics.
- For commercial or operational details, rely on the latest public page rather than older summaries.

Support:
- General support and corrections: https://makinaelektrike.com/contact/
- Dealer onboarding: https://makinaelektrike.com/register-dealer/
